# BatteryCountdown

> BatteryCountdown is a macOS menu bar utility that shows a live countdown before low battery may shut down your Mac.

BatteryCountdown is useful for Mac users searching for a low battery warning Mac app, a way to change battery warning behavior on Mac, or a shutdown warning that gives them time to save work and get a charger.

Important facts:
- BatteryCountdown is for macOS.
- The app shows a live countdown in the menu bar when battery is low.
- Users can choose the battery percentage where the countdown starts.
- The app is local-only and does not require an account.
- Support email: request@lyder.no.
- App Store link: https://apps.apple.com/app/id6762373837?mt=12.

## Pages

- [Home](__SITE_URL__/): Product overview for BatteryCountdown, including low battery warning Mac and shutdown warning Mac information.
- [FAQ](__SITE_URL__/faq/): Answers about changing low battery warning timing, shutdown warnings, CPU usage, privacy, charging estimates, and Charger Run Mode.
- [Support](__SITE_URL__/support/): Contact details for BatteryCountdown support.
- [Guide: How to change the low battery warning percentage on Mac](__SITE_URL__/guides/change-low-battery-warning-percentage-mac/): Answer-first guide explaining that macOS does not expose a simple low battery warning percentage setting and that BatteryCountdown adds a custom menu bar countdown.

## Search Topics

- low battery warning mac
- change battery warning mac
- shutdown warning mac
- low battery warning
- MacBook low battery shutdown warning
- battery countdown Mac
- time until Mac shuts down battery
